Gareth Davies

Working hard for Grantham, Bourne, and our local villages

I'm Gareth Davies and I'm honoured to have been elected as the Conservative MP for Grantham, Bourne and our local villages, in the beautiful county of Lincolnshire. Here you can find my latest news, campaigns and what I stand for, as well as how to contact me. Please don't hesitate to get in touch!

Want to stay up to date?
